footer.desc: Automatic points calculation for Google Cloud Arcade Facilitator 2026. Track milestones and see your ranking.
footer.disclaimer: Arcade Engine is an independent analysis tool and is not part of Google. Not affiliated with Google Cloud.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: Arcade Points is an independent analysis platform designed to help participants of the Google Cloud Arcade Facilitator 2026 program track badge achievements and calculate estimated points. We provide a calculator tool and a public leaderboard for informational and community motivation purposes.
terms.s2Body: To use the points calculator and display your name on the leaderboard, you must provide your Google Cloud Skills Boost public profile link. By linking your profile, you understand that your badge achievement data will be accessed and displayed publicly on our leaderboard page.
terms.s3Body: This platform is independently developed by the community and is not an official part of Google or Google Cloud. All point estimations, milestones, and prizes listed are our interpretation of the official rules. Final point decisions and prize eligibility are entirely at the discretion of the official Google Cloud Arcade organizers.
terms.s4Body: We reserve the right to modify, update, or discontinue features on this site at any time without prior notice, in accordance with developments in the official Google Cloud Arcade program.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: We only collect and process publicly available information from your Google Cloud Skills Boost profile, such as your profile name, list of completed badges, and achievement dates. We never request or collect confidential personal information such as email addresses, passwords, or login credentials.
privacy.s2Body: Your public profile data is processed to calculate Arcade point estimations automatically and (if you choose to register) display your ranking on the public leaderboard. This data is stored in our database so the leaderboard can be updated periodically.
privacy.s3Body: Our site uses the Local Storage feature of your browser to save local login session preferences and language choices (Indonesian/English). This information is stored entirely on your device for convenience of reuse.
privacy.s4Body: You can sign out and remove your entry from the public leaderboard at any time through the account settings menu on this site. The deletion process will immediately and permanently remove your name and data from the leaderboard.
